characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, medium brown complexion, dark hair tied back, wearing a bindi. She has symmetrical features and smooth skin.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey or black collared jacket with white stitching details along the lapels and shoulders.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, medium build, dark complexion, short dark hair styled with a slight quiff. He has a mustache and a light beard.
characters.wardrobe: White short-sleeved shirt with a blue and grey leaf or floral pattern.
characters.demeanor: Expressive, initially hesitant but becomes eager and convinced.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: जब भी मैं English बोलने की try करता हूँ, मेरे दोस्त हँसते हैं। [Whenever I try to speak English, my friends laugh.]
Character B says: एक दिन मैंने कहा, 'My English is very weak only'. [One day I said, 'My English is very weak only'.]
Character B says: तो मेरा दोस्त बोला, 'Weak only'? ये कैसी English है भाई? [So my friend said, 'Weak only'? What kind of English is this, bro?]
Character B says: मुझे बहुत बुरा लगा। [I felt really bad.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core pain point: embarrassment when speaking broken English in front of peers.
- Builds empathy with the target audience who face similar real-world mockery.
- Sets up the need for a non-judgmental practice space.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Tension मत लो। मैं तुम्हारी personal AI tutor हूँ, और मैं judge नहीं करती। [Don't worry. I am your personal AI tutor, and I don't judge.]
Character A says: बस Supernova app पर रोज़ 15-20 minutes practice करो। [Just practice for 15-20 minutes daily on the Supernova app.]
Character A says: हम real-life situations में confidence के साथ English बोलना सीखेंगे। [We will learn to speak English with confidence in real-life situations.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Introduces the AI tutor as a safe, non-judgmental solution.
- Highlights the daily 15-20 minute practice routine.
- Shifts the promise from 'perfect English' to 'confidence in real-life situations', aligning with Supernova's practical brand voice.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: अच्छा? तो मैं एक sentence बोलता हूँ, बताना सही है या नहीं। [Really? Then I'll say a sentence, tell me if it's correct.]
Character A says: बिल्कुल, बोल कर दिखाओ। [Absolutely, go ahead and say it.]
Character B says: My English is that weak. [My English is that weak.]
Character A says: इसे ऐसे बोलो: [Say it like this:]
Character A says: My English is not very strong. [My English is not very strong.]
Character B says: My English is not very strong. [My English is not very strong.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the app's core feature: real-time, interactive sentence correction.
- Shows the AI tutor's encouraging, conversational teaching style.
- Gives the user an immediate 'win' by having them repeat the correct phrasing.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: पर मुझे लगता है इस app के लिए बहुत पैसे लगेंगे। [But I feel this app will cost a lot of money.]
Character A says: बिल्कुल नहीं। Supernova बहुत affordable है, रोज़ की एक कप चाय से भी कम खर्च में। [Not at all. Supernova is very affordable, costing less than a daily cup of tea.]
Character B says: क्या बात है! तो मैं अभी Supernova app download करता हूँ और confident बनकर English बोलता हूँ। [Wow! Then I will download the Supernova app right now and speak English confidently.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Addresses price objections directly without making specific numerical claims.
- Replaces competitor's exact pricing with a relatable 'cup of tea' affordability metaphor.
- Ends with a strong, enthusiastic call-to-action to download the app.
